/usr/bin/cc -rdynamic CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/bufargs.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/cliconn.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/clrfl.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/daemonize.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/error.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/errorlog.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/lockreg.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/locktest.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/nspipe.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/openmax.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/pathalloc.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/popen.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/prexit.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/prmask.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/ptyfork.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/ptyopen.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/readn.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/recvfd.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/semaph.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/senderr.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/sendfd.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/servaccept.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/servlisten.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/setfd.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/setfl.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/signal.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/signalintr.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/sleep.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/sleepus.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/spipe.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/strerror.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/tellwait.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/ttymodes.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/lib/writen.c.o CMakeFiles/10.p6.dir/Chapter-10/p6.c.o -o 10.p6
